seo.title: Apple
seo.description: Discover the innovative world of Apple and shop everything iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Mac, and Apple TV, plus explore accessories, entertainment, and expert device support.

imageCheckResults.alt: iPhone 17 Pro, back exterior, deep blue color, Pro Fusion camera system in top left corner, Apple logo in center, iPhone 17, back exterior, white color, Dual Fusion camera system in top left corner, Apple logo in center, iPhone 17e, back exterior, soft pink color, Fusion camera system in top left corner, Apple logo in center, iPhone Air, side, titanium frame profile, Fusion camera system in top left corner
MacBook Neo in bright citrus color, balanced on fingertips of open hand, screen displaying colorful abstract pattern
iPad Air models floating, back exterior, single-lens camera, front exterior, rounded corners, black display bezel
Text on image, W W D C 26. June 8 through 12. Learn More, Apple Worldwide Developers Conference.
Apple Watch Series 11, rose gold color, aluminum case, sleep score, right side exterior, Digital Crown, microphone, side button, starlight Sport Band
MacBook Pro positioned into the shape of a V, referencing the M5 chip family
AirPods Pro 3, wireless headphones, white color, silicone tips
Side-by-side, hand holding iPhone 13 in silicon case with stickers on back exterior, trade-in with hand holding new iPhone box for iPhone 17 Pro
Apple Card, front, Apple logo in top left, cardholder name in middle left Marisa Robertson, card chip in middle right.

elementAnalysis.pageOverview: The page appears to be the main website of Apple, showcasing various products and services.

tests.name: Verify Header Navigation Links
tests.description: Verify that all navigation links in the header are displayed and clickable
steps: Launch the website
Verify that 'iPhone', 'Mac', 'iPad', 'Watch', 'TV & Home', 'Entertainment', 'Accessories', and 'Support' links are present in the header
tests.expectedResult: All navigation links in the header are displayed and clickable

tests.name: Verify Footer Links
tests.description: Verify that all links in the footer are displayed and clickable
steps: Launch the website
Scroll to the footer
Verify that 'Shop and Learn', 'Account', 'Apple Store', 'For Business', 'For Education', 'For Healthcare', 'For Government', 'Apple Support', and 'Site Map' links are present
tests.expectedResult: All links in the footer are displayed and clickable

tests.name: Verify 'Learn more' Buttons
tests.description: Verify that all 'Learn more' buttons are displayed and clickable
steps: Launch the website
Verify that 'Learn more' buttons are present for iPhone, MacBook Neo, iPad air, MacBook Pro, and AirPods Pro 3
tests.expectedResult: All 'Learn more' buttons are displayed and clickable

tests.name: Verify 'Buy' Buttons
tests.description: Verify that all 'Buy' buttons are displayed and clickable
steps: Launch the website
Verify that 'Buy' buttons are present for iPhone, MacBook Neo, iPad air, MacBook Pro, and AirPods Pro 3
tests.expectedResult: All 'Buy' buttons are displayed and clickable

tests.name: Verify Product Links
tests.description: Verify that all product links are displayed and clickable
steps: Launch the website
Verify that links for iPhone, Mac, iPad, Watch, TV & Home, Entertainment, and Accessories are present in the header
tests.expectedResult: All product links are displayed and clickable

tests.name: Verify Page Title
tests.description: Verify that the page title is 'Apple'
steps: Launch the website
Verify that the page title is 'Apple'

tests.name: Verify Images
tests.description: Verify that all images are displayed correctly
steps: Launch the website
Verify that all images are displayed correctly

tests.name: Verify Responsiveness
tests.description: Verify that the website is responsive
steps: Launch the website on different devices or browsers
Verify that the website layout adapts to different screen sizes

tests.name: Verify Error Handling
tests.description: Verify that the website handles errors correctly
steps: Launch the website
Simulate an error
Verify that the website handles the error correctly

testSuggestions.summary: This test suite covers critical functionality of the Apple website, including navigation, buttons, links, visual elements, responsiveness, and error handling.

testList.name: should have the correct title
testList.description: Verifies the page title matches the expected title.
